title: Coating, Painting, and Spraying Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders
description: Set up, operate, or tend spraying or rolling machines to coat or paint any of a wide variety of products, including glassware, cloth, ceramics, metal, plastic, paper, or wood, with lacquer, silver, copper, rubber, varnish, glaze, enamel, oil, or rust-proofing materials. Includes painters of transportation vehicles such as painters in auto body repair facilities.

tasks.text: Dispose of hazardous waste in an appropriate manner.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Hold or position spray guns to direct spray onto articles.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Spray prepared surfaces with specified amounts of primers and decorative or finish coatings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor painting operations to identify flaws, such as blisters or streaks, and correct their causes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Disassemble, clean, and reassemble sprayers or power equipment, using solvents, wire brushes, and cloths.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fill hoppers, reservoirs, troughs, or pans with material used to coat, paint, or spray, using conveyors or pails.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Clean equipment and work areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply rust-resistant undercoats and caulk and seal seams.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start and stop operation of machines, using levers or buttons.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine paint flow, viscosity, and coating quality by performing visual inspections, or by using viscometers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attach hoses or nozzles to machines, using wrenches and pliers, and make adjustments to obtain the proper dispersion of spray.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Turn dials, handwheels, valves, or switches to regulate conveyor speeds, machine temperature, air pressure and circulation, and the flow or spray of coatings or paints.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe machine gauges and equipment operation to detect defects or deviations from standards, and make adjustments as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine, measure, weigh, or test sample products to ensure conformance to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Buff and wax the finished paintwork.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Use brush to hand-paint areas in need of retouching or unreachable with a spray gun.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Thread or feed items or products through or around machine rollers and dryers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Weigh or measure chemicals, coatings, or paints before adding them to machines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate auxiliary machines or equipment used in coating or painting processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Remove materials, parts, or workpieces from painting or coating machines, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Record operational data on specified forms.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Operate lifting or moving devices to move equipment or materials to access areas to be painted.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Set up portable equipment, such as ventilators, exhaust units, ladders, or scaffolding.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust controls on infrared ovens, heat lamps, portable ventilators, or exhaust units to speed the drying of surfaces between coats.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply primer over any repairs made to surfaces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fill small dents or scratches with body fillers and smooth surfaces to prepare for painting.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Mix paints to match color specifications or original colors, stirring or thinning paints, using spatulas or power mixing equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Remove grease, dirt, paint, or rust from surfaces in preparation for paint application, using abrasives, solvents, brushes, blowtorches, washing tanks, or sandblasters.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Sand and apply sealer to properly dried finish.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
